title: Conlun Cat Litter Mat Litter Trapping Mat, 61 x 43 cm Cat Litter Tray Mat, Premium PVC Grid Mesh Scatter Control Design Litter Box Mat, Waterproof Urine Resistant Material, Easy to Clean, Grey
features: Keep Litter Away from Your Floor: Our cat litter mat features thick, tight mesh and deep grooves designed in a grid pattern, making it highly efficient in trapping and holding the cat litter that splashes out of the cat litter box and gets stuck on your cat’s paws.

Premium Quality: Made from soft PVC material, our kitty litter mat creates a comfortable and cushioned feel for your cat’s sensitive paws, yet soft enough for your cat to nap on. Safe for your cat and environmentally friendly because our cat litter box mat is laboratory tested to be phthalate and BPA-free.

Durability: Long-lasting and durable backing is highly slip-resistant, so the litter catcher mat no track stays securely in place outside of the cat box and it will not damage the surface of your floor; durable enough to withstand your cat’s scratching.
Perfect Size: 61 x 43 cm grey litter mat for litter box is designed so it can hold the litter on the mat and keep your floor clean.

Easy to Clean: The cat litter box liner are easy to clean by simply shaking off, vacuuming. And the materials are waterproof, you can rinse down with soapy water before leaving to fully dry (preferably not in direct sunlight).
